dataQualityNote: Research snapshot from May 12, 2026. Values are directional and include missing or low-confidence fields. Raw footprint charts use source detail tabs; model tier and composite use the original normalization tab. Tour gross is latest public tour gross, while catalog streams and RIAA units are lifetime-style signals.
